item.ptxt: With this test, it can be determined whether the trouble occurs in the electrical circuit or is a mechanical problem in the transaxle.
If any abnormalities are found in the following test, the problem is in the transaxle itself.

step2.ptxt: Disconnect the connector of the transmission wire.
Drive with the transmission wire disconnected.
Shifting the shift lever in the order of L, 2, 3, 4 and D position to check whether the shifting condition changes the table below.

atten4.ptxt: When driving with the transmission wire disconnected, the shift lever position is in L or 2, the gear position is held in 3rd and the shift lever position is in 3, 4 or D, the gear position is held in 4th. However, when the shift position is in R or P, the operation is same as usual.

step2.ptxt: Connect the connector of the transmission wire.
